topic: Configure snapshots and soft delete for Azure Files
key_facts:
NFS snapshot limitations

 Only file management APIs ( AzRmStorageShare ) are supported for NFS Azure file share snapshots.

Limits

 Azure Files supports up to 200 share snapshots per share.
Only file management APIs ( AzRmStorageShare ) are supported for NFS Azure file share snapshots.

Important

 Share snapshots provide only file-level protection.
You can retrieve the list of versions of the directory or file, and you can mount a specific version directly as a drive (only available on Windows - see Limits ).
This feature minimizes the time required to create the share snapshot and saves on storage costs, because you pay only for the changed content.
After reaching 200 share snapshots, you must delete older share snapshots to create new ones.
